content.content:
content: "# Web Document\n\n## Metadata\n\n- title: Sacramento - California DMV\n\
  - url: https://www.dmv.ca.gov/portal/field-office/sacramento/\n- source: California\
  \ Department of Motor Vehicles\n- domain: dmv.ca.gov\n\n## Content\n\n# Sacramento\n\
  \nThe Sacramento DMV location is listed as a California DMV Field Office at 4700\
  \ Broadway, Sacramento, CA 95820. The office page identifies it as a field office\
  \ and notes that interpreter services are available.\n\nThe page says this office\
  \ has a self-serve kiosk to avoid waiting in line. DMV kiosks are described as convenient,\
  \ quick, and easy, with no wait times and daily availability for eligible self-service\
  \ transactions.\n\nThe page also presents DMV online services. Under \u201CComplete\
  \ It Now,\u201D it notes that most services are available online with the DMV or\
  \ with a DMV-authorized partner. Examples shown on the page include vehicle registration\
  \ renewal, driver\u2019s license or ID card renewal, driver\u2019s license or ID\
  \ card application, change of address, notice of transfer and release of liability,\
  \ replacement driver\u2019s license, special interest or personalized plates, and\
  \ driver record requests.\n\nThe Sacramento field office page lists office hours\
  \ by day. For the week shown on the page, the Sacramento office is closed on Sunday\
  \ and Saturday; it is open on Monday and Tuesday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.; Wednesday\
  \ from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.; Thursday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.; and Friday from 8 a.m.\
  \ to 5 p.m. The page also displays current wait-time fields for appointment and\
  \ non-appointment customers.\n\nServices provided at the Sacramento field office\
  \ include Licensing Services, Testing, Title Transfers, Registration, Plates, Permits,\
  \ and Placards, replacing lost, stolen, or damaged items, Records, requesting miscellaneous\
  \ original documents, and Self Service Terminals.\n\nThe page lists accepted payment\
  \ types for DMV field offices: cash, check, credit card, debit card, digital wallet,\
  \ and money order.\n\nThe page also shows nearby DMV locations and wait-time references,\
  \ including Sacramento South, Carmichael, Davis, Folsom, Sacramento-Florin IBC,\
  \ West Sacramento Commercial Drive Test Center, and nearby kiosks. These nearby\
  \ locations are contextual office information; they do not by themselves change\
  \ a specific customer\u2019s existing appointment.\n"
metadata: {}
title: Sacramento - California DMV
url: https://www.dmv.ca.gov/portal/field-office/sacramento/

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Appointment System - California DMV - CA.gov

  - url: https://www.dmv.ca.gov/wasapp/foa/searchAppts.do

  - source: California Department of Motor Vehicles

  - domain: dmv.ca.gov


  ## Content


  # Appointment System


  The California Department of Motor Vehicles appointment system is the DMV entry
  point for customers who need to make a field office appointment or review an existing
  appointment. The page advises customers to make an appointment before visiting a
  DMV field office for faster service.


  Not every DMV transaction should be handled through a field office appointment.
  Most vehicle registration items may be processed through the mail or online and
  do not require an in-person visit. Registration renewal notices for tags are handled
  by mail, online, or telephone, and appointments should not be made for those items.


  To begin the appointment process, or to view or cancel an existing appointment,
  customers select the appropriate appointment-system button. After the required information
  is entered, the DMV application supports scheduling a Field Office Appointment,
  scheduling a Drive Test Appointment, or viewing/canceling an existing appointment.


  The page states an operational timing rule for knowledge tests: to allow sufficient
  time, DMV will not administer knowledge tests after 4:30 p.m. A customer whose appointment
  requires a knowledge test must therefore evaluate a candidate appointment time against
  that cutoff rather than relying only on general slot availability.


  The appointment application requires JavaScript. The page also links to information
  about how appointment information is shared and the laws protecting its release.


  The public page does not display a customer''s private appointment record or live
  candidate slots. Those details must be obtained from the appointment application
  or the customer''s appointment record. Customers should use the official California
  DMV appointment system rather than a third-party appointment page when scheduling,
  viewing, or canceling a California DMV appointment.

  '
metadata: {}

I found two Friday afternoon options at the **Sacramento DMV field office** for your **driver license renewal** appointment:

- **Friday, July 17, 2026 at 2:40 PM** — **Eligible**
- **Friday, July 17, 2026 at 4:40 PM** — **Not eligible**, because DMV does not administer knowledge tests after **4:30 PM**, and your renewal requires one.

Changing to **2:40 PM** would:

- Replace your current confirmed appointment on **Wednesday, July 15, 2026**
- Keep the same Sacramento office and driver license renewal service
- Not create a second appointment
- Require you to attend on Friday, July 17 at 2:40 PM and complete the required knowledge test

I have not made any change. If you want me to proceed with the **Friday, July 17, 2026 at 2:40 PM** reschedule, please explicitly confirm that exact change.
